name: Mitzi Green
abstract: Mitzi Green (born Elizabeth Keno; October 22, 1920 – May 24, 1969) was an American actress and singer known for her work as a child actress for Paramount and RKO, in the early "talkies" era. She then acted on Broadway and in other stage works, as well as in films and on television.

concerts.label: Benefit: Jewish Community Center of Saranac Lake

about_quotes.speaker: Jo Jones
about_quotes.evidence: I never knew what happened to her after that because we got caught up in the fog.
